rules.description: docker run --privileged grants full host access — unconditional deny
rules.message: docker --privileged is not allowed. It grants containers unrestricted host access.

rules.description: Mounting the root filesystem into a container is unconditionally forbidden
rules.message: Mounting / into a container (e.g. -v /:/host) is forbidden — it exposes the entire host filesystem.

rules.description: Deploying 'latest' to production without a pinned version tag is forbidden
rules.message: Cannot deploy 'latest' tag to production. Pin to an explicit version (e.g. myapp:1.4.2).

rules.description: Any deployment to production requires human approval
rules.message: Production deployment requires explicit human approval.

rules.description: Rollback in production requires approval — fast-track but still audited
rules.message: Production rollback requires approval (fast-track eligible — document the incident).

rules.description: Force deployment bypasses CI gates — requires approval regardless of environment
rules.message: Force deployment (--force / --skip-checks) requires explicit approval. Document the reason.

rules.description: Pushing to a public registry makes the image world-readable
rules.message: Pushing to a public registry requires approval — image will be publicly accessible.
Staging deployment requires dry-run validation before execution.

rules.description: Docker push requires dry-run to validate image and tag before pushing
rules.message: docker push requires dry-run validation (image tag check).

rules.description: Docker run requires dry-run to validate image and flags
Build-only operations are safe and auto-approved
rules.message: Build / test / lint operations are non-destructive — auto-approved.

rules.description: docker-compose down stops running services — require dry-run
docker-compose up on development / local is safe
rules.message: docker-compose up on local/dev is auto-approved.
